testcase.name: 18: if gdrive help upload >/dev/null 2>&1 then gdrive upload -p 1MOVmWXkJk4qBHQjCvHmZNjVGW9TRvlWj --name citadel_super_app_0.2.2_28.apk build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/citadel_super_app_0.2.2_28.apk | tail -n1 else gdrive files upload --parent 1MOVmWXkJk4qBHQjCvHmZNjVGW9TRvlWj build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/citadel_super_app_0.2.2_28.apk | tail -n1 fi

26: if gdrive help upload >/dev/null 2>&1 then gdrive upload -p 1MOVmWXkJk4qBHQjCvHmZNjVGW9TRvlWj --name citadel_super_app_0.2.2_28.aab build/app/outputs/bundle/release/citadel_super_app_0.2.2_28.aab | tail -n1 else gdrive files upload --parent 1MOVmWXkJk4qBHQjCvHmZNjVGW9TRvlWj build/app/outputs/bundle/release/citadel_super_app_0.2.2_28.aab | tail -n1 fi
